title: Authentication Cheat Sheet¶
attack_vector:
Authentication Cheat Sheet
¶
Introduction
¶
Authentication
(
AuthN
) is the process of verifying that an individual, entity, or website is who or what it claims to be by determining the validity of one or more authenticators (like passwords, fingerprints, or security tokens) that are used to back up this claim.
